title: Email delivery failure due to IP rejection by Microsoft
symptom: Emails sent from a new Outlook account using the Outlook node fail to deliver, showing a bounce message indicating access is denied from the sending IP.
not_this_if: Older Outlook account works without issues
root_cause: The sending IP address used by the n8n instance is blocked by Microsoft, preventing successful email delivery. This can happen if the IP has been flagged for spam or other issues.
fix_steps: Open a terminal on the machine running Docker.
Execute the command: docker exec -it -u='root' n8n /bin/sh.
Run the command: ifconfig to find the IP address under eth0.
agent_instruction: Identify the IP address used by your n8n instance to send emails and whitelist it with Microsoft.
